text:
--1y/7ip9Z0l6NTTti
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
 Content-Disposition: inline
 
 This bug also affects the regular mirror selection list, not just when you
 select "Other".
 
 
 If you use the main mirror (ftp.freebsd.org) for example, the installation will
 fail due to the files not being found on the mirror (with the
 /releases/<arch>/<arch>/9.0-BETA1 URL).
 
 
 
 - R. Tyler Croy
